3068470.name: Pizza Hub
3068470.description:
Welcome to Pizza Hub! 🍕


Pizza Hub is an exciting and fun clicker game where you can get unique pizzas and meet friends in a vibrant multiplayer hub! Dive into the pizza disco, earn money by being part of the hub, and buy pizzas crafted by the community in our fantastic Discord community. 🌟



👥 Multiplayer Hub: Join friends in a bustling hub where you can chat, collaborate, and enjoy the community's pizza creations. Earn money simply by being in the hub, with future plans to earn extras by participating in activities.

🎉 Pizza Disco: Enjoy the lively pizza disco, a random event where pizzas are half-price. Dance, socialize, and take advantage of the discounts!

🌟 Steam Inventory: Pizzas you buy are added to your Steam inventory. Own, brag, or sell your pizzas to other players for the right price. (Currently in development)

💰 Dynamic Pricing: Use the money you earn to buy pizzas. The price of pizzas increases with each purchase, and the rarity chances increase from common to legendary pizzas. The count resets, and pizza prices return to the base price at 00:00 Italy time.
Multiplayer Hub: Meet friends and compete in a fun multiplayer environment. Play with friends online and show off your unique pizza collection.

💬 Community-Driven Development: Join our active Discord community to share feedback, suggestions, and pizza designs. Help shape the future of the game with your ideas and creativity!

🔧 Future Plans: The full version of Pizza Hub will include additional features, enhanced gameplay mechanics, and a broader scope. Expect new pizzas, more interactive multiplayer experiences, and expanded community-driven content creation tools. We'll also add ways for you to show off your pizzas in-game.

Join Our Discord


Join our Discord Community to participate in the development, share your pizza designs, and connect with fellow players! Let's build a pizza paradise together! 🍕🎊
